statement: Young adults universally prefer dark mode, so it should be the default for that audience.
why_it_spreads: Trend-following and conflating a popular option with a universal demographic preference.
evidence_against: NN/g on dark mode (src-nngroup): preference is individual and context-dependent; light mode can improve performance for some visual tasks and some readers with conditions like astigmatism.
Preference varies with ambient light, content type and accessibility needs, not age alone.
replacement_principle: Offer a user-controllable theme that respects the operating-system preference (prefers-color-scheme) rather than forcing a default by demographic assumption.
